scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w @toppfinance/api" "npm run dev -w @toppfinance/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @toppfinance/shared && npm run build -w @toppfinance/api && npm run build -w @toppfinance/web
scripts.backup: npm run build -w @toppfinance/shared && npm run build -w @toppfinance/api && tsx scripts/backup.ts
scripts.backup:verify: npm run build -w @toppfinance/shared && npm run build -w @toppfinance/api && tsx scripts/verify-backup.ts
scripts.backup:restore: npm run build -w @toppfinance/shared && npm run build -w @toppfinance/api && tsx scripts/restore-backup.ts
